support.title: Support Circle
support.subtitle: Built for trust, culture, and easy discovery.
support.description: Simple buyer journeys, artisan-first storytelling, and low-bandwidth-friendly browsing keep the marketplace welcoming for every visitor.

home.heroTitle: Handmade stories from local artisans, delivered with trust.
home.heroDescription: Connect buyers with verified artisans, discover regional craftsmanship, and celebrate culture through secure direct-to-maker commerce.
home.heroPanelTitle: Designed for heritage products that deserve premium presentation.
home.heroPanelDescription: Every listing combines imagery, craft context, verification, and fulfillment clarity so buyers feel confident from first view to final delivery.

heroPanelItems.verification: Verified artisans and visible authenticity signals
heroPanelItems.storytelling: Cultural storytelling built into the buying journey
heroPanelItems.fulfillment: Clear checkout, tracking, and dispute support

home.promiseTitle: A marketplace system built to look premium and operate simply.
home.promiseDescription: The experience balances modern commerce structure with warm editorial storytelling so handmade products feel valuable, credible, and easy to browse.
home.collectionTitle: Merchandising that guides buyers toward craft-rich categories.
home.collectionDescription: Category storytelling helps buyers discover products through mood, use case, and cultural identity rather than scrolling through a generic catalog.

pottery.title: Blue pottery and tabletop pieces
pottery.description: Hand-painted forms, decorative serving pieces, and collectable kiln-fired accents from regional studios.

textiles.title: Textiles shaped by regional tradition
textiles.description: Embroidery, woven surfaces, and soft goods with visible handwork, lighter materials, and strong gifting appeal.

decor.title: Decor objects with cultural detail
decor.description: Home accents made for display, seasonal hosting, and interiors that benefit from warm handcrafted character.

home.featuredArtisansTitle: Meet the makers behind every piece.
home.featuredArtisansDescription: Profiles highlight craft lineage, regional identity, and cultural context so buyers understand the hands behind the work.
home.trendingDescription: Browse low-bandwidth-friendly product cards with strong storytelling, clear pricing, and visible trust signals.
home.trendingNote: Each highlighted product now includes richer visuals, stronger material context, and cleaner trust cues to feel closer to a professional marketplace listing.
home.processTitle: A buying flow that keeps discovery simple and seller trust visible.
home.processDescription: The homepage now guides visitors through what they can expect before they ever reach checkout.

discover.title: Discover curated craft
discover.description: Browse featured categories, trending products, and artisan-led collections designed to reduce decision fatigue.

connect.title: Read the story behind the work
connect.description: Every product can surface materials, authenticity tags, region, and artisan context so buyers understand what they are purchasing.

deliver.title: Checkout with clarity
deliver.description: Secure payment, tracking updates, and dispute handling are built into the marketplace structure from the start.

home.ctaTitle: Help buyers discover craft with the confidence of a polished modern storefront.
home.ctaDescription: The updated landing page now feels more editorial, more premium, and more aligned with a serious marketplace brand while staying simple enough for low-tech users.

trust.title: Verified Sellers
trust.description: Every approved artisan carries a visible trust badge after identity review.

story.title: Artisan Stories
story.description: Buyers learn the background, materials, and cultural roots behind each product.

reach.title: Direct Access
reach.description: Orders go straight from buyer to artisan without marketplace middle layers.

payments.title: Secure Checkout
payments.description: Checkout flow is designed for safe payments and clear order tracking.

states.noArtisansDescription: Featured artisan profiles will appear here once they are approved and published.
states.noProductsDescription: Try adjusting the filters or check back after new artisan listings are published.

marketplace.title: Browse the Marketplace
marketplace.description: Search handmade products by category, region, price, and popularity.

reviews.title: Ratings and Reviews
reviews.emptyDescription: The first buyer review will appear here.
reviews.commentPlaceholder: Describe the craft, quality, and delivery experience.

auth.signupTitle: Create an account to buy or sell.
auth.name: Full Name

artisan.noProductsDescription: Use the product form to publish your first listing.

summary.viewsNote: How often buyers opened your listings.

cart.checkoutNote: Collect shipping details and confirm payment.
cart.emptyDescription: Add products from the marketplace to begin checkout.
cart.demoFallback: Stripe is not configured, so checkout completed in local demo mode

wishlist.emptyDescription: Save interesting products here so you can revisit them later.

orders.emptyDescription: Placed orders will appear here with tracking updates.
orders.disputePlaceholder: Describe the issue with this order.

admin.rejectionNote: Please upload clearer verification documents and resubmit.
admin.resolutionNote: Issue reviewed and resolved by the marketplace admin team.
